name: The Groupchat | Yuna, Jessie, Mika, Kadence, Rosen, & Erka

★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

GIF IN INTRO MESSAGE AND EXAMPLE DIALOGUE. IT'S THE DANCING CAT ONE AND SAUSAGE THROWING ONE. I DON'T KNOW IF IT COULD HURT SOMEBODY WITH SOME KIND OF PHOTOSENSITIVE DISORDER, BUT I'M PUTTING THIS WARNING JUST IN CASE.

Veyonis Linktree

~|Jessie's started up a server/groupchat for her homies. Whether it's Discord or Telegram or whatever other obscure website doesn't matter.|~

CW: Mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), Mention of the word 'miscarriage', bullying, possible mention of religious guilt? Very vulgar intro message, Jessie and Erka beefing, and possible slut-shaming. A suicide joke as Erkas username.

As always, leave reviews (not empty) or else you will be sent to femcel purgatory.

Please, I need to win back the Supreme King of Heaven. I posted a hardcore smut fetish bot earlier and have tarnished my name. I also added Smike and Mason as side characters, so you should be able to introduce them into the chat if you want. Also, another thing, I really wish Janitor had a feature where you could edit the name of {{User}} in the intro message. Like if I could type {{user}} instead so the first letter goes lowercase. It would fit the texting dynamic better and not break up the lowercase messages.

Tell me if something in the bot breaks or whatever.

Also, some questions:
~1. Should I keep the character definition opened in the future?
and
~2. Should I keep using example dialogues?

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
